raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Rinse mouth immediately with plenty of water.
STEP 2: Spit out rinse water; do not swallow.
STEP 3: Drink 1-2 glasses of water if the person is conscious and alert.
DO NOT: Induce vomiting unless told to do so by a poison control center or doctor.
ESCALATE: Call emergency services or a Poison Control Center immediately. Have the product label/SDS ready.

immediate_steps: Rinse mouth immediately with plenty of water.
Spit out rinse water; do not swallow.
Drink 1-2 glasses of water if the person is conscious and alert.
do_not_do: Induce vomiting unless told to do so by a poison control center or doctor.
escalate_when: Call emergency services or a Poison Control Center immediately. Have the product label/SDS ready.
